page: Google Cloud Platform c3d-highmem-60 is a memory-optimized server powered by an AMD EPYC 9B14 processor using the x86_64 architecture. It features 60 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 30 physical cores with multithreading enabled. The system is equipped with 480 GB of RAM, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, and provides zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

In benchmark evaluations, this instance demonstrates strong multi-core CPU performance, scoring in the top 25% for stress-ng multi-core, Geekbench multi-core, and PassMark CPU tests. Its memory subsystem shows high performance for small-block cached reads at 4247.01 GB/sec, though large-block uncached read and write operations perform in the average range. Cryptographic and mathematical capabilities are enhanced by hardware support for AVX-512, AES, and SHA-NI instructions, resulting in strong scores for encryption and database operations.

The c3d-highmem-60 offers high resource density, making it a qualitatively cost-efficient choice for memory-intensive workloads that do not require local SSD storage or GPU acceleration. It is highly suited for large-scale database operations, Redis in-memory caching, software compilation, and medium-scale LLM text generation.
description: Google Cloud Platform c3d-highmem-60 is a memory-optimized server configured with 60 dedicated vCPUs and 480 GB of RAM, utilizing AMD EPYC 9B14 processors on the x86_64 architecture. Featuring 30 physical cores with multithreading, this instance delivers strong multi-core processing and memory performance, particularly in cached read operations and database transactions. It lacks local storage and GPU accelerators, making it a specialized resource-dense option. The hardware supports advanced instruction sets like AVX-512 and SHA-NI, which drive strong performance in cryptographic tasks, software compilation, and Redis operations. This server is highly suited for memory-intensive workloads, including in-memory databases, caching layers, and medium-scale language model inference.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform c3d-highmem-60 is a memory-optimized server featuring 60 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs and 480 GB of RAM, designed for high-throughput database and memory-intensive workloads.
meta_description: Google Cloud Platform c3d-highmem-60 features 60 AMD EPYC vCPUs and 480 GB RAM, optimized for memory-intensive database and caching workloads.
tagline: A memory-optimized x86_64 server with high-density RAM and dedicated AMD EPYC processing for demanding database and caching workloads.
bullet_points: 60 dedicated vCPUs and 480 GB RAM providing an 8.0 GB per core memory ratio
Powered by AMD EPYC 9B14 processors with AVX-512 and cryptography instruction support
Strong multi-core performance and high-speed cached memory bandwidth
No local storage or GPU accelerators included in the base configuration
Best suited for in-memory databases, Redis caching, and software compilation
